stemHtml: An IFR flight has been given descent instructions below the Minimum Safe Altitude (MSA) but above the Minimum Vectoring Altitude (MVA). The temperature is ISA -10°C. Who is responsible for terrain separation?

options.a: The PIC and the routing should not be accepted.
options.b: The PIC and the PIC should accept the routing.
options.c: The Controller and the PIC should not accept the routing.
options.d: The Controller and the PIC should accept the routing.
